entities.name: Mass of Nativity of Queen of Angels

attributes.preface: ... Et te in nativitate beate Marie

entities.raw_quote: In 4a die missam de nativitate imperatricis angelorum [et] ... Et te in nativitate beate Marie

entities.name: Mass of Annunciation
entities.raw_quote: In 5a die missam annunciacionis eiusdem [et] ... Et te in annunciacione

entities.name: Mass of Nativity of Christ

attributes.preface: ... Quia per incarnati verbi misterium nova

entities.raw_quote: In 6a die missam nativitatis Christi, et ista sit prefacio: ... Quia per incarnati verbi misterium nova

entities.name: Mass of Epiphany

attributes.preface: ... Quia, cum unigenitus tuus in substancia nostre

entities.raw_quote: In 7a die missam epiphanie, et prefacio: ... Quia, cum unigenitus tuus in substancia nostre

entities.name: Mass of Purification

attributes.preface: ... Et te in purificacione beate Marie

entities.raw_quote: In 8a die missam purificacionis, et prefacio: ... Et te in purificacione beate Marie

entities.name: Mass of Resurrection

attributes.preface: ... Et te quidem, Domine, omni tempore set in hac potissimum nocte

entities.raw_quote: In nona die missam resurreccionis, et prefacio: ... Et te quidem, Domine, omni tempore set in hac potissimum nocte

entities.name: Mass of Ascension

attributes.preface: ... Qui post resurreccionem suam omnibus discipulis suis manifestus apparuit

entities.raw_quote: In 10a die missam ascencionis, et prefacio: ... Qui post resurreccionem suam omnibus discipulis suis manifestus apparuit

entities.name: Mass of Assumption of Blessed Mary
entities.raw_quote: In XIa die missam assumpcionis beate Marie, et prefacio sit: ... Et te in assumpcione

entities.name: Mass of All Saints
entities.raw_quote: In 12a die missam omnium sanctorum, et prefacio apostolorum sit

entities.name: Mass of the Angels
entities.raw_quote: In 13a die missam angelorum, et prefacio apostolorum

entities.name: Mass of the Holy Spirit
entities.raw_quote: In 14a die missam Spiritus sancti, et prefacio sit: ... Qui ascendens super omnes celos

entities.name: Mass of the Holy Cross

attributes.preface: ... Qui salutem humani generis in ligno

entities.raw_quote: In quintadecima die missam sancte crucis, et prefacio sit: ... Qui salutem humani generis in ligno

entities.name: Mass of the Trinity

attributes.preface: ... Qui cum unigenito filio tuo et Spiritu sancto unus es<t> Deus

entities.raw_quote: In 16a die missam trinitatis, et prefacio sit: ... Qui cum unigenito filio tuo et Spiritu sancto unus es<t> Deus

entities.name: Raising of the Winds

attributes.location: outside house, away from circle by 2-3 stadia

entities.raw_quote: Excitacio ventorum est principium operandi in illa XIa hora diei operis sacri et debet fieri extra domum, longe a circulo ad duo stadia vel tria.

entities.name: Wand (Virga)
entities.raw_quote: Virga autem sit quadrata, et in uno latere scribatur in summitate Adonay; on the second side Sabaoth; on 3 Hiskiros; on 4 Emanuel.

entities.name: Whistle (Sibilum)

attributes.material: white copper, silver, gold, or hazel

entities.raw_quote: Fac sibilum de ere albo vel de argento vel de auro vel avellana, et sit eptagonum, id est septem latera habens.

entities.name: Adonay
entities.raw_quote: in uno latere scribatur in summitate Adonay

entities.name: Sabaoth
entities.raw_quote: in secundo latere Sabaoth

entities.name: Hiskiros
entities.raw_quote: in 3 Hiskiros

entities.name: Emanuel
entities.raw_quote: on the fourth Emanuel.

entities.name: On
entities.raw_quote: in summitate eius sculpatur hoc nomen: On

entities.name: Beel
entities.raw_quote: inferius in alia summitate Beel

entities.name: Barthan
entities.raw_quote: nomen regis orientalis, scilicet Barthan

entities.name: Formione
entities.raw_quote: nomen regis consol, scilicet Formione

entities.name: Yammax
entities.raw_quote: regis meridiei, scilicet Yammax

entities.name: Sarabocres
entities.raw_quote: regis nogahelis, scilicet Sarabocres

entities.name: Harthan
entities.raw_quote: regis occidentalis, scilicet Harthan

entities.name: Abaa
entities.raw_quote: regis frigicapicis, Abaa

entities.name: Maymon
entities.raw_quote: regis septemtrionalis, Maymon

entities.name: Casziel
entities.raw_quote: principes eorum omnium sunt 7, ut patuit supra: Casziel, Satquiel et cetera.

entities.name: Satquiel
entities.raw_quote: Casziel, Satquiel et cetera.

entities.name: Barachiel
entities.raw_quote: Adhuc sunt 7 superiores, scilicet Barachiel, Uriel et cetera.

entities.name: Uriel
entities.raw_quote: Adhuc sunt 7 superiores, scilicet Barachiel, Uriel et cetera.

entities.name: Honorius
entities.raw_quote: quem fecit Honorius, magister Thebarum.

entities.name: Seal of God

attributes.arrangement: Top seal on skin, others hang below

entities.raw_quote: in illa pelle, ubi est sigillum Domini, debent esse tria sigilla predicta sub signo ita, quod pendeant de manu.

entities.name: Circle for Good Angels

attributes.height: three and a half feet high

entities.raw_quote: debent apparere infra circulum, qui debet esse altus tribus pedibus et semis.

entities.name: Circle for Aerial Spirits
entities.raw_quote: illi aerei apparent extra circulum in aere homine existente infra circulum, qui debet esse totus planus

entities.name: Circle for Terrestrial Spirits

attributes.shape: concavum, profundum et rotundum (hollow, deep, round)

entities.raw_quote: ipsi apparent infra circulum concavum, profundum et rotundum

summary: This chunk details the final days of purification involving specific masses for days 4 through 16, followed by instructions for raising winds and preparing ritual tools like a square wand and heptagonal whistle inscribed with divine names and spirit kings. It distinguishes summoning circles for good angels versus aerial or terrestrial spirits and concludes with the book's claimed powers and authorship by Honorius.
key_passages: Excitacio ventorum est principium operandi in illa XIa hora diei operis sacri et debet fieri extra domum, longe a circulo ad duo stadia vel tria.
Virga autem sit quadrata, et in uno latere scribatur in summitate Adonay; on the second side Sabaoth; on 3 Hiskiros; on 4 Emanuel.
Fac sibilum de ere albo vel de argento vel de auro vel avellana, et sit eptagonum, id est septem latera habens.
Hic est liber, quo Deus in hac vita facialiter quit videri. Hic est liber, quo quilibet potest salvari et in vitam eternam procul dubio deduci.
Angeli hore sunt qui regnant in hora operis, angeli diei qui in die operis, angeli mensis angeli Lune vel principii mensis.
